game_name: Gabriel Knight: Sins of the Fathers

sub_pixel_system.notes: Point-and-click adventure game; sub-pixel precision not applicable to gameplay mechanics

tier_notes: Gabriel Knight is a point-and-click adventure game with third-person perspective. Movement is controlled through navigation interface (WALK icon) and location map selection, not continuous character physics. No documented jump mechanics, gravity calculations, or physics parameters exist for this game paradigm. Physics-based movement parameters are not applicable to this genre.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Gabriel Knight: Sins of the Fathers
